title: ICICI Bank eyes $500 million dollar bond issue via GIFT City - The Economic Times
text:
ICICI Bank is close to raising at least $500 million through five-year dollar bonds via its GIFT City unit, leveraging the RBI’s concessional swap facility. The proceeds will support client financing, marking the lender’s first US dollar bond issuance in nearly a decade.
